headline: POTTERY BARN KIDS LAUNCHES COLLABORATION WITH TUTU DU MONDE
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 31, 2026--Pottery Barn Kids, portfolio brand of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the world’s largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, announced today a new collaboration with Tutu du Monde, the popular children’s fashion brand renowned for ethereal, hand-embellished tutus and couture-inspired dresses. The exclusive Tutu du Monde for Pottery Barn Kids collection translates the fashion brand’s signature aesthetic—delicate tulle, intricate embellishmen
